name: Pulcherrima
description: Forward voice. Gemini 2.5 Flash TTS with natural language style control. Supports prompt-directed tone, accent, pace, and multi-speaker conversations.
licenseNotes: Gemini API usage governed by Google AI Terms of Service.

metadata.searchDescription: Pulcherrima Forward Gemini TTS Google AI voice style control multilingual forward presentation

samples.label: Default
samples.transcript: Let me get straight to the point — here's exactly what we need to do next.

modelCard.architecture: Gemini multimodal transformer with TTS output head
modelCard.dataRetention: Subject to Google AI data usage policy
knownLimitations: Preview — API may change before GA
Text-only input, audio-only output (no multimodal mixing in TTS mode)
No SSML — uses natural language prompts for style control instead
Multi-speaker limited to 2 speakers per request
Rate limited: 10 requests/minute on free tier
modelCard.notes: Voice style: "Forward". Supports natural language style direction — prefix text with instructions like "Say cheerfully:" or "In a whisper:". Multi-speaker mode supports up to 2 voices per conversation. Also available on gemini-2.5-pro-preview-tts for higher quality. 70+ languages supported. Style, accent, pace, and tone controllable via prompt engineering.
modelCard.hardwareRequirements: Cloud API — no local hardware required
